title: client-research unified report
description: Shape of report.json, written by the forensic-report skill at .client-research/<slug>/report.json once stack-research, vendor-research, and competitor-research are all done for a client. report.pdf is a rendering of this same data -- this schema is the single source of truth for both.

sources.description: The three source skills' own checklist.json content for this client, verbatim -- forensic-report reads, never rewrites, these files.

cross_references.description: Overlaps forensic-report noticed across the three skills' findings -- e.g. a name that shows up as both a vendor-research provider and a stack-research tech signal (same tool, two independent angles corroborating each other).

verification_summary.description: Aggregate view of source metadata across all three skills, for the forensic framing -- how many sources, of what type, were actually checked.
